pages.title: Say It With Your Eyes
pages.tagline: Step into the hushed glow of Southern soul.

pages.body: Imagine standing in a dimly lit room where unspoken glances hold more weight than words. This slow-burning D# major track at 123 BPM invites you to close your eyes and feel the dusty, atmospheric intimacy creeping through every breathy syllable. The chopped vocals loop over heavy sub-bass, creating an underground club vibe that feels both distant and immediate. It captures a tense yet hypnotic moment of visual obsession, where a single clean frame freezes time between two souls connected by silence. As the intensity fades into a quiet afterglow, you are left with only the lingering echo of that connection.
pages.styleSentence: A slow-burning D# major track at 123 BPM featuring chopped and screwed vocals over a dusty Southern R&B beat with heavy sub-bass, atmospheric synths, and distant guitar textures that create an underground club vibe.

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Breathes life into every hushed, repetitive note with closeness.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers warmth beneath the lead voice without overpowering it.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking with a steady, hypnotic pulse.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds subtle texture to maintain tension throughout the journey.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Delivers heavy sub-frequencies that anchor every emotional moment.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints atmospheric skies above the dusty beat and vocals.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Weaves distant guitar sounds into a surreal, dimly lit setting.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Provides faint textures that drift through the darkened room.

levels.name: SHADE RISES
levels.emotion: Anticipation and quiet tension setting the stage for a visual encounter.

levels.name: FOCUS LOCKED IN
levels.emotion: A focused request to capture a fleeting moment of connection amidst distraction.

levels.name: DARK ROOM DANCE
levels.emotion: Hypnotic longing and the surreal sensation of moving through a dark room solely for visual contact.

levels.name: COLD ELEGANCE LOOP
levels.emotion: Reinforced obsession with the subject's cold elegance and knowing distance.

levels.name: FREEZE FRAME NOW
levels.emotion: Sudden stillness that freezes the scene on a single striking detail.

levels.name: QUIET GOODBYE ZONE
levels.emotion: Gratitude mixed with finality after an intense emotional exchange.

levels.name: FADE TO AFTERGLOW
levels.emotion: Lingering echo of the visual connection fading into a quiet afterglow.
